summary: Tested M1 (PurchaseOrderManagement UX improvements) and M2 (Approval queue drill-down). M1 features verified successfully: ConfirmModal replaces browser dialogs for cancel/close/reject actions, notice bars replace alerts for validation. M2 has a critical navigation bug preventing access to Approval Pembelian page.

critical_bugs.issue: Manager role cannot navigate to 'Approval Pembelian' page. Clicking the sidebar link does not navigate to the purchase-approval view. Page remains on product catalog (Katalog Kain Nusantara) instead of showing PurchaseApprovalView component.
critical_bugs.affected_flow: M2 - All approval queue tests blocked
critical_bugs.reproduction: 1. Login as manager@kainnusantara.id, 2. Expand PEMBELIAN sidebar group, 3. Click 'Approval Pembelian' link, 4. Page does not navigate to approval queue
critical_bugs.expected: Should navigate to PurchaseApprovalView showing approval queue with data-testid='purchase-approval-view'
critical_bugs.actual: Remains on product catalog page with title 'Katalog Kain Nusantara'

passed_tests: M1.1 - CANCEL flow: ConfirmModal appears (NO browser alert), confirm button works, success notice shows 'PO-00007 berhasil dibatalkan'
M1.2 - CLOSE-SHORT flow: ConfirmModal with required reason textarea, confirm button disabled when empty, enabled after typing, success notice shows 'PO-00006 ditutup (kurang terima)'
M1.3 - CREATE validation: Error notice bar shows 'Nama supplier dan gudang wajib diisi' (NO browser alert)
M1.4 - PAY validation: Inline error shows 'Nominal harus lebih dari 0' (NO browser alert)
Login flows: Admin and Manager login successful
Navigation: PO Management page loads correctly for admin role
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix M2 navigation bug - 'Approval Pembelian' sidebar link not navigating to PurchaseApprovalView for manager role. The link appears in sidebar but clicking it does not change the active view from product catalog to purchase-approval. Check: 1) Sidebar click handler for 'purchase-approval' navId, 2) App.js routing for activeView === 'purchase-approval', 3) Navigation config mapping. All M2 tests (expandable rows, approve/reject with modal) are blocked until this is fixed.

success_percentage.M2_ApprovalQueue: 0% (0/3 tests passed - blocked by navigation bug)
